summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YA Commerce OTP authentication system. All backend APIs and frontend UI are functioning correctly with enhanced rate limiting, OTP verification, and error handling working as expected.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 OK with service status
POST /api/auth/email/send-otp sends OTP and returns success with remaining_requests count (4 remaining after first request)
POST /api/auth/email/verify-otp with wrong OTP returns error with attempts remaining (shows '4 attempts remaining')
POST /api/auth/phone/send-otp accepts valid 10-digit phone and returns success with remaining_requests count
POST /api/auth/phone/send-otp rejects invalid phone with 400 error
Rate limiting: 6th request to same email returns 429 'Too many requests' with UTC timestamp
OTP verify with invalid format (short OTP) returns 400 'Invalid email or verification code'
Frontend homepage loads correctly with hero section and navigation
Frontend auth page shows Email tab, Phone tab, and Google login button with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend cart page loads with proper empty state message
Email and phone input validation working correctly on frontend
Tab switching functionality working properly between Email and Phone
Send buttons properly enabled/disabled based on input validation

success_percentage.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed - all OTP endpoints working including rate limiting)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (8/8 tests passed - all UI elements and interactions working)
